probability.last_reasoning: Bear case increased from 10% to 13%: RLUSD contraction, Extreme Fear at 10, rising JGB yields, and persistent data gaps on 3 of 5 kill switches erode confidence in the base-to-mid timeline. Base case reduced from 40% to 42% (net shift from mid). Mid case reduced from 38% to 34%: the higher-return scenarios require institutional momentum that is currently stalling or unmeasurable. Bull case trimmed 1% to 11%. The overall shift reflects honest assessment that the macro stress environment and RLUSD contraction are headwinds that didn't exist at the Feb 27 calibration.

bear_case.score_reasoning: Elevated from prior assessment. RLUSD contraction, persistent kill switch data gaps, Extreme Fear sentiment, and 10 days of zero permissioned DEX adoption constitute real evidence that the thesis timeline is under pressure. The institutional evidence remains strong on paper but thin on measurable execution.

competing_infrastructure.name: SWIFT GPI
competing_infrastructure.status_text: SWIFT GPI continues expanding reach to 4,000+ banks with improving speed metrics. Pre-validation and case resolution features reduce friction that originally motivated alternatives.

competing_infrastructure.name: Visa B2B Connect
competing_infrastructure.status_text: Visa B2B Connect operating in 100+ markets. Enterprise adoption leverages existing Visa relationships — a distribution advantage Ripple cannot easily replicate.

competing_infrastructure.name: JPMorgan Kinexys
competing_infrastructure.status_text: Kinexys (formerly Onyx) processes $2B+ daily in intrabank transfers. JPMorgan's balance sheet and regulatory standing give it institutional credibility that XRP-based solutions must still prove.

competing_infrastructure.name: BIS Project Nexus
competing_infrastructure.status_text: Nexus connecting domestic instant payment systems across jurisdictions. If Nexus achieves multi-currency settlement without XRPL integration, it directly competes with the ODL use case. Kill switch 9 is specifically tracking this.

competing_infrastructure.name: Ethereum Institutional
competing_infrastructure.status_text: Ethereum L2 ecosystem (Base, Arbitrum) capturing institutional DeFi interest. BlackRock's BUIDL fund on Ethereum demonstrates institutional preference for ETH-based tokenization in some segments.

bear_case.odl_stagnation: ODL volume data has been unavailable for the entire monitoring period — we literally cannot confirm whether the core utility thesis is real or stagnant.
bear_case.token_velocity_concern: Token velocity metrics remain UNKNOWN (kill switch 8). Without hold-time data, the bear case that XRP functions as a pass-through with no value accrual cannot be refuted.

macro_headwinds.name: Global Recession Risk
macro_headwinds.status_text: Fear & Greed at 10 (Extreme Fear), rising Japanese yields, and active tariff regime signal real recession probability. Institutional adoption timelines historically extend during downturns.

macro_headwinds.name: Crypto Winter Signals
macro_headwinds.status_text: XRP at $1.37 (down 3.5%), Extreme Fear reading, and RLUSD contraction are early warning signs. Not yet winter, but the season is turning colder.

macro_headwinds.name: Regulatory Reversal Risk
macro_headwinds.status_text: SEC case resolved, 7 ETFs live, Clarity Act pending. Regulatory environment remains the strongest pillar of the thesis. No reversal signals detected.

macro_headwinds.name: Rate Hike Extension
macro_headwinds.status_text: US 10Y at 4.02% with no clear rate cut path. Prolonged higher-for-longer environment compresses risk asset valuations and may slow institutional crypto allocation timelines.

bear_case.bear_narrative: The thesis's central claim — that institutions need XRP as a bridge asset for cross-border settlement — is under existential pressure from three directions: banks are building their own tokenized deposit networks already processing $2B/day (Kinexys), USDC has a 40:1 liquidity advantage capturing institutional flows now, and central banks are explicitly designing CBDC interop layers that bypass bridge assets entirely. Most critically, Ripple's refusal to publish ODL volume data since rebranding means we cannot verify the thesis's core proof point, and their silence is itself a signal. REDUCE EXPOSURE immediately while forcing resolution on ODL volume data — if that metric cannot be verified within 60 days, escalate to EXIT SIGNAL.
